chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Spl. STRA 24 of 2024 Spl. STRA 25 of 2024 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection 2. For hearing of main case 09.12.2025 Mr. Iqbal Hussain, advocate for the applicant Mr. Ajeet Sundar, advocate for respondent On 02.12.2025 following order was passed: “02.12.2025 Mr. Iqbal Hussain advocate for the applicant Mr. Ajeed Sunder advocate for respondent Learned counsel for the respondent places on record copy of judgment reported as 2022 PTD 1781. He states that the said judgment has been relied upon by the impugned tribunal. Under such circumstances, he states that unless the judgment of the High Court has been set aside, no case made out to ever file the reference under consideration. Learned counsel for the applicant seeks time to obtain instructions. At his request, to come up on 09.12.2025. Office is instructed to place copy of this order in connected file” Learned counsel for the applicant states under instructions that the contention recorded is correct, therefore, these reference applications may be dismissed as withdrawn. Order accordingly. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 47 subsection 5 of Sales Tax Act, 1990. Office is instructed to place copy of this order in connected matter. Judge Judge Amjad
